---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the Arabic RTL starter template
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Idea

Describe the proposed feature or improvement briefly.

## Why It Fits

How does this help users of `django-static-starter-ar` as the Arabic RTL version of a reusable starter template?

## Proposed Scope

- What should be added?
- What should stay out of scope?

## Constraints

- Keep the repository framed as a reusable starter template, not a product-specific app.
- Do not suggest unsupported product features such as OAuth, JWT, password reset, trial signup, subscriptions, payments, protected dashboards, or frontend build tooling.
- Do not add new dependencies, `package.json`, an `npm` workflow, or a frontend build step unless explicitly justified.
- Frontend auth state must remain memory-only.
- Preserve the documented Django session/cookie auth contract, or update the related docs and tests if changing it explicitly.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or better-fit alternatives, or write "None".
